chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH,CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 3324 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 11.04.2023 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with Muhammad Yaqoob Buriro DSP Hala, Syed Saeed Ahmed Shah SHO Bhitshah, Shahid Usman Malik then SHO Bhitshah, ASI Ghulam Mustafa Lakho PS Bhitshah, ASI Abdul Walid and HC Ghulam Shaber Farash of PS Bhitshah and Inspector Javed Akhtar on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad. Muhammad Yaqoob Buriro DSP Hala, Syed Saeed Ahmed Shah SHO Bhitshah, Shahid Usman Malik then SHO Bhitshah, ASI Ghulam Mustafa Lakho PS Bhitshah, ASI Abdul Walid and HC Ghulam Shaber Farash of PS Bhitshah and Inspector Javed Akhtar on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad are present submit that against brother and father of missing person so many FIRs are registered. This petition has been filed only to pressurize the police from pursuing those FIRs. They further submit that they have investigated the matter and they have information that missing person has concealed himself on his own for the purpose of filing this petition. Be that as it may, no one is present on behalf of the petitioner and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
